title: MGN 428 (M+F) Amendment 4 artificial optical radiation regs 2010
body: "Notice to all ship, yacht and fishing vessel owners, operators and managers and other employers of seafarers; masters, officers and seafarers on merchant ships, hovercraft and yachts; and skippers and crew of fishing vessels, small commercially operated vessels and yachts with paid crew, whether operating at sea or on inland waters.  This notice should be read in conjunction with MGN 636 (M) amendment 4 and MGN 587 (F) amendment 1 ILO work in fishing convention: health and safety responsibilities which give guidance on the merchant shipping and fishing vessels (health and safety at work) regulations 1997 (SI 1997/2962) and replaces MGN 428 (M) amendment 3. "
